description: Create a custom sidebar tab in TiddlyWiki titled 'Projects' that dynamically lists all tiddlers tagged with 'ProjectAlpha' as clickable links, sorted alphabetically. The tab must be implemented using a tiddler titled '$:/custom/ProjectDashboard' tagged with '$:/tags/SideBar' and containing a 'caption' field set to 'Projects'. The body of the tiddler must use a list widget to display the links to the 'ProjectAlpha' tiddlers sorted by title.
